shortDescription: "One cannot invoke toString() on a String"

If you have an object of type `String`, you can't invoke `toString()` on it, because it already is a `String`.

frontmatter.shortDescription: One cannot invoke toString() on a String
frontmatter.shortCorrection: One can invoke toString() on a String
